title: fun and cool mods
description: better terrain, better structures, morph mod, and alot more!
body:
this modpack aims to feel like a mix between vanilla and modded, it has some mods that feel like vanilla such as terralith and betterend/nether, and then some that dont feel vanilla like the morph mod. the modpack is still in early beta so it may crash sometimes, doesnt work good on low end systems. please change the mod configs as one of the first things you do when starting the modpack, since the default configs arent that good together. (like two huds overlapping, starhud and the minimap mod.)



<details>
<summary>Coolest features the mod adds:</summary>

- :better terrain generation (terralith, better nether, better end, biomesOplenty)
- :backpacks(travelers backpacks)
- :elytra while wearing armor(elytra slot)
- :morph mod (remorphed)
- :better structures (yungs better [[structure]])
- :bedrock bridging (bridging mod)
- :better block placing when holding (accurate block placement)
- :zoom (zoomify)
- :easy multiplayer with friends (e4mc)
- :shaders (iris)
- :optifine resource pack support (cit resewn)
- :mob vote mobs (friends and foes)
- :voice chat (simple voice chat)
- :more swords (simply swords)
- :more fun combat (better combat)
- :record cinematic videos (flashback)
- and alot more!

</details>
